chapter_title.en: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)

text: اَلصَّادِقُ جَعْفَرُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ: "مَنْ خَلاَ بِذَنْبٍ فَرَاقَبَ اَللَّهَ ذِكْرُهُ فِيهِ وَ اِسْتَحْيَا مِنَ اَلْحَفَظَةِ غَفَرَ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ لَهُ جَمِيعَ ذُنُوبِهِ وَ إِنْ كَانَتْ مِثْلَ ذُنُوبِ اَلثَّقَلَيْنِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.5895 - Al-Husayn ibn Yazid narrated from Ali ibn Ghurab who said: Abu Abdullah (as), said: "Whoever commits a sin in private and then fears Allah (swt), exalted be His (swt) mention, regarding it, and feels ashamed before the recording angels; Allah (swt), the Majestic, will forgive all his sins, even if they are as numerous as the sins of the two weighty beings (humankind and jinn)."
